titleStmt.title: SII 41.262: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 262. (A.R. No. 479 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the south wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara Virapratapa Devaraya, Saka 1349, Plavanga = 1427 A.D.

summary.p: Beginning of this inscription is not traceable. Records a royal order (rāyasam) saying that the income from several taxes from the dēvadāna villages and the revenue income (mutal) from the villages held by the jīvitakāṟar, adikārikaḷ, ūravar, and tānikar should be used for the temples themselves for conducting worship and festivals, etc. It was also ordered that the temple villages (dēvamaṇḍalam) should not given for lease. The taxes included veṭṭi, kaṭṭāyam, arisikāṇam, naṟpasu, naṟkiḍā, nallerumai, āyam, talaiyārikkam, sāda and pala-kāṇikkai. Mentions that the royal order was executed by Ariyappa Daṇṇāyakkar and Bhikshāvritti Aiyagaḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvaraṉ śrīvirapratāpadevarāyamahāirāyar cantirakirirācciyam tiruvālaṅkāṭu kāñcipuram tirukkāḷahastitiruvoṟṟiyūr tiruppālaivaṉam
takkum vanta Irāyasappaṭikku Ariyappataṇṇāyakkar Irāyasamum bhikṣāvratti Aiyakaḷirāyasamum cantirakiridevarāya Uṭaiyā
koṇṭuvarukaiyil Inta Irāyasappaṭikku śakāptamāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu nāṟpattu Oṉpatiṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa pala
ṟ coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭil Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉārko
vipūtikāṇikkai kaḻittu Atikāri kaṭaikkūṭṭaṉ Aṅkacālaiivakaḷai nokki Atikāri joṭimukappārvai viceṣātāyam
veṭṭi kaṭṭāyam Aricikāṇam nallerutu naṟpacu naṟkiṭā nallerumai Āyam talaiyārikkam cātam maṟṟum palakāṇikkai Inta vakaippaṭi mutal Uḷḷatum jīvitakāṟar Atikārikaḷ Uḷvaritāṉikar kaikkoṇṭa kṣe trattil mutal Uḷḷatum Uṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭarattile mutaliṭṭuk koṇṭu
paṉmāheśvararaiyum vayiravanāyiṉāraiyumuḷḷiṭṭuk koṇṭu mahāpūcai tiruppaṇi tiṅkaḷt tivasam tirunāḷ nitta Uṟcavaṅkaḷum tāḻvaṟa naṭattik koḷḷak kaṭavatu devamaṇṭalaṅkaḷ Iyātoruvaṟkum kuṭukkakkaṭavatu Allavākavum Inta Irāyasappaṭi cantiṟātittava
raiyum naṭakkakaṭavatu Ākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉār Uṇṭu Āṉāl civatturoki kurutturoki Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉār keṅkaikaraiyil kurāl pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷ cokkanāyiṉār tiruvāṇaikku tappārāka kaṭavum Ippaṭi Ivai paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
